title: SqueeZee Goo Octo Ball (One Supplied)
description: Product description Kids will love squishing and stretching this Squeezee Goo Octo Squish Ball. The squishy fun just got even better with its cute & colourful Octopus design. Kids will love watching it squash out when they squeeze, returning to its original shape & colour as they let go. One colour will be sent at random. Safety Warning Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
